prompt: Create a high-quality voxel art 3D render of a single fantasy goblin warrior character, centered on a clean off-white studio background. The character is built entirely from visible cube blocks in a Minecraft-like voxel style, with crisp grid-aligned geometry, soft ambient occlusion, and subtle studio shadows under the feet. Show the goblin in a three-quarter front view, standing upright with a slightly hunched, mischievous posture. The goblin has olive green skin, a large square head, long pointed ears extending horizontally, dark heavy brow ridges, narrow yellow eyes, a protruding tan blocky nose, two small lower tusks, and a stern grumpy expression. Outfit details: a dark brown sleeveless vest, a brown ragged loincloth skirt, a simple belt with tan hanging strips, wrist wraps, ankle wraps, and a small bone or tooth pendant necklace. The left hand grips one large crude wooden club made of stacked brown voxel blocks, held upright beside the body; the right hand hangs open in a curled blocky claw shape. Use earthy colors, realistic voxel lighting, bevel-free cubic forms, detailed layered block construction, and a polished game-character collectible render look. No text, no watermark, no extra characters, no environment props beyond the ground shadow.
